description: Print the contents of a file as it existed at a specific commit, without checking anything out
intents: show me what this file looked like at a specific commit
print the contents of a file as it was in the past
view a file at an old commit without checking it out
see how a file used to look at a particular point in history
dump an old version of a file to stdout
read a past version of a file without touching my working tree
what did this file contain three commits ago
